name: Blender Action: Set Render Settings
description: Creates a Blender action to configure render settings: engine (CYCLES, BLENDER_EEVEE, BLENDER_EEVEE_NEXT, BLENDER_WORKBENCH), resolution, samples, output path, file format, frame range, and GPU toggle.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]

    def _get(key, default):
        v = inputs.get(key)
        return v if v is not None else self.get_parameter(key, default)

    action = {
        'type': 'set_render_settings',
        'render_engine': _get('render_engine', 'CYCLES'),
        'resolution_x': int(_get('resolution_x', 1920)),
        'resolution_y': int(_get('resolution_y', 1080)),
        'resolution_percentage': int(_get('resolution_percentage', 100)),
        'samples': int(_get('samples', 128)),
        'use_gpu': bool(_get('use_gpu', False)),
        'output_path': _get('output_path', ''),
        'file_format': _get('file_format', 'PNG'),
        'frame_start': int(_get('frame_start', 1)),
        'frame_end': int(_get('frame_end', 100)),
    }
    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added set_render_settings action ({action["render_engine"]} {action["resolution_x"]}x{action["resolution_y"]} {action["samples"]}spp)')
    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
